zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Gibbons of East Yorkshire於1528年出生在英國越可爾馬波萊頓時，他的父親William Gibbons24歲，母親Margaret Dudley22歲。他於1557年與Lady Joan Marsh在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1597年在他的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Gibbons of East Yorkshire于1528年出生在英国越可爾馬波萊頓时，他的父亲William Gibbons24岁，母亲Margaret Dudley22岁。他于1557年与Lady Joan Marsh在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1597年在他的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gibbons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Gibbon , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (Mayo): in Ireland, the name is frequent and has been Gaelicized as Mac Giobúin. It is also found as a variant of Fitzgibbon .

variants.name: Gibbens
meanings: German: patronymic from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with geba ‘gift’.

variants.name: Gibbon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Giboin (ancient Germanic Gebawin).
English: alternatively, a diminutive of the personal name   Gibb  .
Scottish and Irish: variant of   McGibbon  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Gibbons of East Yorkshire was born in 1528, in Mappleton, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Gibbons, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Dudley, was 22. He married Lady Joan Marsh in 1557, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1597, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

Il a épousé Lady Joan Marsh en 1557, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1597, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

Er hat 1557 in Yorkshire, England Lady Joan Marsh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1597 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ko.Mappleton, Yorkshire East Riding, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 마플턴
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Gibbons of East Yorkshire(이)가 1528년 영국 요르크실르 마플턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Gibbons(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Dudley(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1557년 영국 요르크실르에서 Lady Joan Marsh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1597년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Gibbons of East Yorkshire родился в 1528 г. в местности мапплетон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Gibbons было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Dudley, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joan Marsh в 1557 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1597 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.
